entry.title: Re: My First RAP Project. Many errors in Child and Parent...
entry.content: I copied from SAP learning training git hub. kindly let me know good source of example to learn. Thanks

entry.title: Re: DVM Strategy - ECC 6.0 / Oracle - SAP IQ
entry.content:
Hello,

it seems like your goal is to reduce the size of your oracle database by archiving.

SAP IQ is not required for this. you can implement the high volume archive objects & housekeeping on some technical tables. 

Regards,

Satya

entry.title: Re: PRINT & OUTPUT MANAGEMENT: output parameter determina...
entry.content:
Hello Jana,

in the production order, you have the following options:

Currently an enhancement of this structure (BRF) is not possible in Public Cloud.

Regards Johannes
Johannes Schulte | Senior SAP Expert
Email: johannes.schulte@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com
On behalf of: Vicoland GmbH
Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: Re: Monitoring Number Ranges (NRIV) to guard against a range exhausting
entry.content: Hi David Can you please give me steps for configuring automatic email alerts for spool number range

entry.title: Re: Generate Formatted or structured EMAIL using CBMA
entry.content:
Dear All,
We found the solution. Please disable the parameter aggregate alerts.
https://me.sap.com/notes/3369910

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Wrong behaviour of cl_gui_alv_grid or wrong usage?
entry.content: There are many little flaws in cl_gui_alv_grid, I think it's because it's very complex and designed with not everything in mind since the beginning, so lots of fixes and "now" it's too late to rewrite the class. You may also consider calling er_data_changed->display_protocol( ), always (the popup won't be displayed if there's no message).

entry.title: Re: Problem activating Support user via SLD or RSP
entry.content:
Hi mpanari 

This issue is known to us and will be fixed in Feature Package 2508 of SAP Business One 10.0.

Please look for SAP Note 3597725. Also check solution from note  3597725.

Please log a support case using component SBO-BC-SLD for further processing.

thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Error Log - Pay Comp Recurring Calc Columns
entry.content: So a solution might be to upload again the template configuration? Ok, thank you. I will try that.

entry.title: Re: SLD does not update the company list even though the...
entry.content:
Dear rimaribe 

You should try removing and re-registering the SQL server in the SLD.
And this should not remove any configuration or deployment.

Note: you may take SLD database backup before doing this.

Kind Regards
Nidhi 
SAP Support

entry.title: SAP CI-DS in SAP BTP Cloud foundry
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Requesting your input or guidance on how to enable SAP CI-DS in BTP cloud foundry and it is only recommended for IBP integration? If it can be done only in neo environment, how to move it to CF in future once neo is obsolete?.

Kindly share the details and any prerequisites needed for enablement.

Many Thanks,

Malathi

entry.title: one day before the employee's leave start date
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have configured a workflow rule to notify the manager one day before the employee's leave start date, as requested. The rule is working, and the alert is being sent out successfully.

However, I'm facing an issue where the manager is receiving two identical email notifications instead of just one. The reminder should only be triggered once via email.

Could someone please help me identify why this duplication is happening and suggest how to ensure the manager receives only a single reminder

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Instance creation for apiportal-apiaccess plan in btp...
entry.content: Hi @Muniyappan, I am facing same issue. How many tries it took for creating the instance

entry.title: Re: Error Log - Pay Comp Recurring Calc Columns
entry.content:
Hi @DariusSoreata - I forgot to mention, uploading the template config will overwrite the existing configuration. So if you have custom logic already configured, you will need to re-configure again.

When doing implementation, it is a good practice to always backup (export) the configuration first before making any changes.

entry.title: Re: SLD, License and Extension Manager Error Installing S...
entry.content: I got the solution, Uninstall SAP and install again all.

entry.title: Cannot change Document Owner in SAP Business One version 10
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it confirm only Super User manager and Support User can change posted Sales transaction Document Owner?

I tested granted Full Authorization and Data Ownership, removed Sales Employee in SAP User Employee Master, reset a non Super User to Super User in a different testing database and still encounter wierd database error 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: SAP TechEd 2025: Registration is live – check out our brand new hybrid experience!
entry.content:
Looking forward to catching up with everyone again! #sapcommunityiscominghome 🙂 

@TammyPowlas will you be there too?

entry.title: Custom WDV Depreciation Key for Depreciation Area 15 (Local tax)/Income tax calculation
entry.content:
Dear Expert/Team,

Our client has a requirement to calculate depreciation using the WDV (Written Down Value) method for various assets with different percentage under ledger 0L – Depreciation Area 15 (Local Tax).

Upon review of the standard depreciation keys via the “Depreciation Key Details” tile, I could not find keys where the WDV percentage is configurable. Additionally, as these are SAP standard keys, they cannot be modified directly.

We require guidance and support in creating new depreciation keys with the necessary WDV percentages applicable to Depreciation Area 15. The setup should allow the calculation of depreciation as per the WDV method with the specified rates for different asset types.

Kindly suggest a solution

Thanks in advance

Regards

Aswathe M

entry.title: Re: SLD, License and Extension Manager Error Installing S...
entry.content: We can upgrade direct, Problem solved by doing Uninstall SAP and deactivate antivirus. Install SAP and upgrade DB

entry.title: Re: Non PO Invoice Item Not Picked S/4HANA from SAP Busin...
entry.content: Did the proposed solution resolve the issue.

entry.title: Net expense is less than advance amount in Travel Management.
entry.content:
In the scenario where net expense is less than advance amount and difference amount is to be recovered from Employee.

Net amount recoverable need to be posted in GL# XXXXXX – Emp Various deduction account.

Currently is also posting in Vendor as Employee A/C.

entry.title: Re: SAP Std API Odata V2 Consumption via Service Consumpt...
entry.content: Although I have no BTP in my landscape - The trick is it create the Service consumption model in a BTP Trial account & copy the same into S/4 On prem or Private cloud. How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: How to realize a profit and loss statement in a Datas...
entry.content:
Hello,

Depending on your requirements and constraints, those would be the approaches that come to mind (from better to worse in terms of ease of implementation and probably performance):

  1. Use an account hierarchy defined in DSP. In case only additions are required and if it makes sense for your chart of accounts and calculations (aggregations).
  2. Add calculations at story level using the 'Add row' feature + formulas
  3. Add these calculated accounts in your DSP fact view by:
    • Keeping your original dataset
    • Doing an union with the same dataset where you add your calculated accounts and implement whatever calculation logic is required. Think about aggregating those newly calculated accounts as much as it functionally make sense to avoid creating too much data volume.

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP DM public api CORS error
entry.content:
This is a standard browser CORS issue due to the local browser requesting data. Within NodeJs you need to route the request via a proxy. Here is an example

Create server.js as below (modifying the *** with your details)

const express = require('express');
const axios = require('axios');
const cors = require('cors');
const app = express();

app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true }));


app.post('/api/token', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const tokenResponse = await axios.post(
      'https://********.authentication.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token',
      new URLSearchParams({
        grant_type: 'client_credentials',
        client_id: '******',
        client_secret: '******'
      }),
      {
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' }
      }
    );

    res.json(tokenResponse.data);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error getting token:', error.response?.data || error.message);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Token request failed' });
  }
});


app.get('/api/orders', async (req, res) => {
  const token = req.headers['authorization']; // Expect Bearer token from frontend
    try {
    const response = await axios.get(
      `https://api.eu20.dmc.cloud.sap/order/v1/orders/list?size=100&plant=***`,
      {
        headers: { Authorization: token }
      }
    );

    res.json(response.data);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching orders:', error.response?.data || error.message);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Order fetch failed' });
  }
});

 Then either within a separate script or directly in your HTML file however you like

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>SAP Order List Viewer</title>
  <style>
    body {
      font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
      margin: 20px;
    }
    #orderList {
      margin-top: 20px;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      width: 100%;
    }
    #orderList th, #orderList td {
      border: 1px solid #ddd;
      padding: 8px;
    }
    #orderList th {
      background-color: #f2f2f2;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<h2>SAP Order List Viewer</h2>
<button id="fetchBtn">Fetch Orders</button>

<table id="orderList">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Order Number</th>
      <th>Status</th>
      <th>Description</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody id="orderBody">
    <!-- Order rows will go here -->
  </tbody>
</table>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/axios/dist/axios.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.getElementById('fetchBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    // Step 1: Get Token
    axios.post('http://localhost:3001/api/token')
      .then(tokenRes => {
        const token = tokenRes.data.access_token;

        // Step 2: Fetch Orders
        axios.get('http://localhost:3001/api/orders', {
          headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }
        })
        .then(orderRes => {
          const orders = orderRes.data.content; 
          const tableBody = document.getElementById('orderBody');
          tableBody.innerHTML = '';

          if (orders && orders.length > 0) {
            orders.forEach(order => {
              const row = document.createElement('tr');
              row.innerHTML = `
                <td>${order.customerOrder || 'N/A'}</td>
                <td>${order.status || 'N/A'}</td>
                <td>${order.description || 'N/A'}</td>
              `;
              tableBody.appendChild(row);
            });
          } else {
            tableBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="3">No orders found.</td></tr>';
          }
        })
        .catch(err => {
          console.error('Error fetching orders:', err);
          alert('Error fetching orders. Check console for details.');
        });
      })
      .catch(err => {
        console.error('Error getting token:', err);
        alert('Error fetching token. Check console for details.');
      });
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>

 


Any other questions feel free to DM me

entry.title: Re: error while using DTW
entry.content:
Hi jindonguyen,

This appears to be some sort of database corruption because you are importing very limited data and still the issue occurs.

We would ask you to create an incident under the component SBO-DTW to get it investigated.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Support

I need to drill up/down, but i am always at the default member i selected when i am saving the dimension table. The screen shot i posted above.

entry.title: Integration Assessment - Manage Request Workflow with APIs
entry.content:
Introduction

Integration Assessment, a capability of SAP Integration Suite, allows you to evaluate and maintain consistent use of integration technologies across your integration landscape. It is based on the Integration Solution Advisory Methodology (ISAM) and utilizes a workflow-based based approach to gather requirements and choose the appropriate integration technology for specific integration needs.

Previously, the workflow was entirely UI-driven, but we now offer specific APIs to facilitate better integration with external systems.

The sections below will guide you on how to utilize the APIs to integrate the process with external systems. It will provide examples, which will help you to use the APIs for yourself.

Preconditions

To follow the examples, the following preconditions must be fulfilled:

  • You have a valid SAP Integration Suite subscription and activated the Integration Assessment capability.
  • You enabled the API access to Integration assessment and created a service key.
  • You are able to access the API via a REST client (e.g. Postman).
  • You are familiar with the Integration Assessment Request Workflow, i.e. the concept of Business Solution Requests and Interface Requests including their technical entities (Request, RequestLineItem, IntegrationFlow, MessageFlow)

The examples given in the article point to the API endpoint of the EU10 landscape (https://intas-api.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/intas/entities/v1). The specific endpoint you need to use will be visible in the service key of the related Integration Assessment API service instance.

For accessing the UI, this article assumes the subdomain 'thisisanexample', resulting in the URL https://thisisanexample.intas.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com

Workflow

The example in this article will demonstrate how to create and process business solution requests and interface request using the API. The primary concept is to generate all the request entities via APIs while handling the requirement analysis and technology selection via the UI. This way, external systems can initiate the workflow, while the more complex technology selection is directly offered by the service. At the end of the technology selection, users can download a PDF summary of the selections made and process this further in an external system.

Create Business Solution Request

The first step to initially start the workflow is to create the business solution request. This can be easily achieved via the API.

POST on https://intas-api.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/intas/entities/v1/Request with body

{
  "Name": "New Business Solution Request"
}

see full specification here

This call will create a new business solution request and return the newly created entity. It is important to note down the id property as we need this for upcoming calls. We assume the id value '8deb4b5c-0679-4048-ad9c-fd4956a0025c'.

The business solution request is represented by the technical entity Request. If it is created initially, it will be created in draft status. You can see the possible states a Request can have in the API description here.

Answer Business Solution Request Questionnaire

For further processing the questionnaire for the request needs to be answered. You can do that by accessing following URL: https://thisisanexample.intas.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/app/index.html#/Worklist/SolutionRequest/8deb4b5c-0679-4048-ad9c-fd4956a0025c

Note that the GUID attached at the end of the URL is the one from the previously created request.

This step may be skipped in case you define an empty questionnaire for the Business Solution Request

Submitting the request and adding an Interface Request is not necessary as this is done via API in the next step.

Create Interface Request

A new Interface Request can be created by using the API

POST on https://intas-api.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/intas/entities/v1/CreateInterfaceRequest

{
	"Name": "New Interface Request",
	"RequestId": "8deb4b5c-0679-4048-ad9c-fd4956a0025c",
	"StyleId": "15562407-5770-45ea-aa26-b9e6cd36ab12",
	"SourceApplicationInstances": [
		{"Id":  "42b4a6f6-310f-40b2-bcd8-625fbce558dd"}
	],
	"TargetApplicationInstances": [
		{"Id": "46b37842-b7fa-404f-a5b7-d919c6400dc2"},
		{"Id": "c4be1e2b-a581-4759-b7bb-12e639f2452a"}
	]
}

see full specification here

Beside a name for the interface request you also need to provide additional parameters:

  • RequestId: The id of the previously generated request.
  • StyleId: The id of the style to use. In this case the id refers to the style "Process Integration", which is part of the standard content delivered. You can get the ids of the styles in your system by using the respective API.
  • Source/TargetApplicationInstances: The ids of the source and target application instances. The ids can be also retrieved via API. The ids given here are examples only and do not refer to any standard content.

By using this API multiple entities in the backend are created, the business solution request itself remains in state draft.

The API will also return the id of the generated interface request. We assume 

07d31b7a-eb9f-4091-89c7-37913cd7a392 for now.

Submit Business Solution Request

After the interface request was created and the questionnaire for the business solution request was answered (or deactivated), the request can be submitted.

PATCH on https://intas-api.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/intas/entities/v1/Request('8deb4b5c-0679-4048-ad9c-fd4956a0025c')

{
	"Status": "new"
}

see full specification here

The call to the API triggers the state change of the request and sets it open.

Process Interface Requests

After the request is submitted, the individual interface requests need to be processed and a technology must be selected. As mentioned earlier, this should be done using the Integration Assessment UI. With the ID of the previously generated interface requests, you can construct the URL to access the interface request by appending the id.

In our case, the URL is https://thisisanexample.intas.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/app/index.html#/Worklist/InterfaceAssessment/07d31b7a-eb9f-4091-89c7-37913cd7a392

By accessing this URL and starting to process the interface request, the related business solution request will change its status to in progress.

After the technology has been selected, you are also able to download a PDF report of the interface request. You may use this file and attach it to an external system to document the technology selection.

Complete Business Solution Request

After all interface requests have been processed, you are able to complete the request.

PATCH on https://intas-api.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/intas/entities/v1/Request('8deb4b5c-0679-4048-ad9c-fd4956a0025c')

{
	"Status": "completed"
}

see full specification here

The call to the API triggers the state change of the request and sets it to completed.

In case you want to remove the business solution request completely you can also delete the entity:

DELETE on https://intas-api.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/intas/entities/v1/Request('8deb4b5c-0679-4048-ad9c-fd4956a0025c')

see full specification here

Summary

This blog article has shown how to use the Integration Assessment APIs to manage the request workflow. By doing so, it is possible to integrate the Integration Assessment into external systems and workflows.

entry.title: Re: Recovering from a large number of failed transport.
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. It was very helpful!

entry.title: Time Tracking Limitations and possible workarounds
entry.content:
Hi there,

Is there a list of current time tracking limitations and their possible workarounds? 

Thank you.

entry.title: How to Handle Script Task Limit Exceeded Error in process Automation for Email Body Generation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on an automation in SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) where we need to fetch data from an API and include it in the body of an email. Without the use of Agent.
Here’s the scenario:

  • We are using an HTTP action to call the API and retrieve the data.
  • A script task is used to convert the API response (which contains a responseArray with multiple EDIDC and EDID4 objects) into an HTML table to be used as the email body.
  • The script generates the HTML content and stores it in the context variable $.context.htmlTable.

However, we are facing an issue because the data size exceeds the 100 KB limit for the script task in BPA, 
"Script Task" failed
Error message: Execution of task 'script_1' has been stopped while executing the statement [<...], as it reached the time limit

. The API response can contain a large number of records, and converting this into HTML is causing the script to go beyond the allowed limit.

Here is the script we are using

// Step 1: Get the API response
var responseArray = $.context.action_get_getZidocZidoc_1.result.responseArray;
 
// Step 2: Validate response
if (!responseArray || responseArray.length === 0) {
throw new Error("No records found");
}
 
// Step 3: Escape HTML
function escapeHtml(text) {
text = (text === null || text === undefined) ? "" : String(text);
return text.replace(/&/g, "&").replace(/</g, "<").replace(/>/g, ">");
}
 
// Step 4: Build table rows
var rows = "";
for (var i = 0; i < responseArray.length; i++) {
var edidc = responseArray[i]["EDIDC"] || {};
rows += "<tr>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["DOCNUM"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["IDOCTP"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["MESTYP"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["CREDAT"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["SNDPRN"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["RCVPRN"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["STATUS"]) + "</td>" +
"</tr>";
}
 
// Step 5: Final table
var html = "<h3>IDOC Report</h3>" +
"<table border='1' cellpadding='5' cellspacing='0'>" +
"<tr><th>DOCNUM</th><th>IDOCTP</th><th>MESTYP</th><th>CREDAT</th><th>SNDPRN</th><th>RCVPRN</th><th>STATUS</th></tr>" +
rows +
"</table>";
 
// Step 6: Store in context
$.context.htmlTable = html;



Could you please suggest a solution or workaround to handle this limit exceeded error? Some ideas we are considering include:

  • Splitting the data into smaller chunks and processing them in multiple script tasks.
  • Using an external service to generate the HTML and call it via an action.
  • Any other best practices or standard approaches in BPA for handling large datasets in script tasks.

    Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: [ServiceLayer] Cancel a JournalEntry and specify the...
entry.content:
I think you can use the patch approach

PATCH /JournalEntries({JournalNo})
{
    "UseAutoStorno": "tYES",
    "StornoDate": "2025-06-25"
}

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts
entry.content: @Candida - I am not aware of any general issue and we verified that the cross-subaccount setup is still working as expected. Can you please share more information on the error you are getting?

entry.title: Re: Data Transfer Workbench (DTW) dependencies on MS Acce...
entry.content:
Hi @softestplease ,

Kindly refer to SAP Note 3333754 for the same.

As of SAP Business One version 10.0 Feature Package 2305, DTW also supports versions of Microsoft Access Database Engine higher than 2010. However, DTW installation still installs "Microsoft Access database engine 2010 (English)". If you do not need "Microsoft Access database engine 2010 (English)", you can use the following workaround:

  1. Manually uninstall "Microsoft Access database engine 2010 (English)" after installation of DTW.
  2. Manually install a Microsoft Access Database Engine version higher than 2010.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Support

entry.title: Partial Clearing for Vendors
entry.content:
Dear All,

in Clearing Screens, when allocating partial amounts the system creates postings in the balance sheet however assigned open items do not change at all. For instance if i post a partial clearing via Post Outgoing Payments the open items still show up as not cleared with the full amount while the assigned (partial) payment show up as new open item to be cleared. My understanding or my expectation is, if we allocate partial amounts only the residual amount will remain while the assigned payment is fully in status cleared and the invoice is partially cleared. Actually the only thing that happens is once the "clearing" is done the sytems assigns the invoice reference to the payment document. I could get the same result posting an on account payment. Do i miss anything in terms of doing the right clicks?

Many thanks

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Support of SAP Build Work Zone, advanced and much more: SAP Mobile Start V2.2 & 2.3 - Releas

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts

entry.title: Re: Workflow translation at user decision step
entry.content:
when translating WF u need to know that u have to translate WF and the steps.

call SE63 and then translate -> ABAP Object -> transport object

select R3TR and then u have 2 things to choose one is PDWS wich is to Translate the WF and there is PDTS to translate the step.

for example u have the WF WS9100555 then u choose first PDWS and then put the WF number 9100555
after finishing u have to choose PDTS and translate ALL the steps u have lets say u have only one stepp TS9100300

then choose PDTS and but the number 9100300 then translate

entry.title: Receive EDI Messages with Attachments (base64) via Standard Business Document(SBDH) IA
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a requirement where I need to receive EDI Messages via AS2 Adapter with Attachments (base64) which are sent as Standard Business Document (SBDH).
Im using SAP Integration Suite B2B Scenarios for standard EDI Messages but can't find a standard solution for attachment is there any standard solution for Attachments ?

Attached the SBDH structure.

Best Regards,
Philipp

entry.title: Factory calendar
entry.content:
How to set up a factory calendar in the public cloud and assign it to a work center?
I need to copy the Japanese calendar and set a few rest days as a new calendar. How can this be achieved in public cloud?

Thank you！

entry.title: Mastering Executive Communication: Crafting Messages That Drive Action
entry.content:
Communicating with and presenting to executives requires a unique approach. Executives are often pressed for time and need information that is clear, concise, and actionable. Here’s how to prepare your presentation’s messaging to ensure it resonates with executives and prompts them to take action.

Be Clear and Concise

Executives appreciate brevity. Get straight to the point and avoid unnecessary details. Use clear and straightforward language to convey your message. This not only respects their time but also ensures that your key points are easily understood.

Focus on the Big Picture

Executives are strategic thinkers. Frame your message in the context of the organization’s goals and objectives. Highlight how your proposal or information aligns with the company’s vision and contributes to its success. This helps executives see the relevance and importance of your message.

Provide Data and Evidence

Support your message with relevant data and evidence. Executives rely on facts and figures to make informed decisions. Present your data in a clear and accessible format, such as charts or bullet points, to make it easy to digest.

Offer Solutions, Not Just Problems

When presenting an issue, always accompany it with potential solutions. Executives are problem-solvers and appreciate proactive thinking. Outline the steps you recommend and explain the benefits and potential outcomes. This shows that you’ve thought through the issue and are ready to take action.

Be Prepared for Questions

Anticipate the questions executives might have and be prepared with answers. This demonstrates your thorough understanding of the topic and your readiness to engage in a meaningful discussion. It also helps in addressing any concerns they might have promptly.

Use Visual Aids

Visual aids can enhance your message and make it more memorable. Use slides, charts, or infographics to highlight key points and data. Visuals can help in breaking down complex information and making it more accessible.

Follow Up

After your initial communication, follow up with a summary of the key points and any agreed-upon actions. This reinforces your message and ensures that everyone is on the same page. It also shows your commitment to seeing the issue through to resolution.

Conclusion

Effective communication with executives is about clarity, relevance, and actionability. By being concise, focusing on the big picture, providing data, offering solutions, being prepared for questions, using visual aids, and following up, you can ensure your messages are well-received and acted upon. Master these techniques to enhance your executive communication skills and drive organizational success.

entry.title: MDK 25.6 : Format Rule Not Applying Correctly
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I'm encountering an issue with my MDK Android application (built with MDK 25.6 and running on Android 14) where my formatrule is not applying as expected. The rule is designed to clean phone number inputs by removing non-digit characters and optionally limiting to 10 digits.

Here's the JavaScript code for the one of format rule PhoneNumberFormat rule:

JavaScript
 
/**
 * Describes this function...
 * @param {Icontext} context
 */
export default function PhoneNumberFormat(context) {
    // Get the current value of the control
    let value = context.getValue();

    // If input value is falsy (e.g., if the user deletes the input), then just return
    if (!value) return value;

    // Remove all non-digit characters
    value = value.replace(/\D/g, '');

    // Limit to 10 digits (optional, adjust as needed)
    if (value.length > 10) {
        value = value.substring(0, 10);
    }

    return value;
}

When testing on an Android 14 device, the input field does not seem to respect this formatting; non-numeric characters are not being removed, and the length restriction is not enforced visually or upon input.

I have already verified the following:

  • Rule Definition: The PhoneNumberFormat rule is correctly defined and present in the MDK metadata.

  • Target Control: The rule is properly assigned to the FormatRule property of the relevant SimpleProperty .

  • Data Binding: The control's Value property is correctly bound to a data source.

  • MDK Client Version: I'm using an MDK client built with MDK SDK version 25.6.

  • Android Version: The issue is observed on devices running Android 14.

Could you please provide insight into any known compatibility issues with format rules on MDK 25.6 running on Android 14, especially concerning string manipulation or input validation? Additionally, are there any specific debugging steps or workarounds you'd recommend for this scenario?

entry.title: Text Element Formatting in Smart Forms
entry.content:
In a SmartForm text element (format: **HL**), I have added the following line:

<B8> &V_BILL_TEXT& N° &IS_ZINVOICE-ADDS_INFO-XBLNR&</>

However, when I view the output or go back into the editor, the system automatically modifies the line by adding multiple nested `<B8>` tags, like this:


HL <B8> &V_BILL_TEXT&<B8><B8><B8><B8><B8><B8> N°
&IS_ZINVOICE-ADDS_INFO-XBLNR&</></></></></></></>

Why this automatic tag duplication is happening. How to fix this?

entry.title: Re: Wrong behaviour of cl_gui_alv_grid or wrong usage?
entry.content: That's right, Ryan. It's hard to distinguish between an error and wrong usage sometimes. The question is: Why is in this case L_VISIBLE 0?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG Certificate
entry.content:
Grasp the high level understanding of each application from Governance to Mass processing, their architecture - high level workflows - no need to get into the depth or micro details, but you have to be prepared with understanding of the solution, how data flow happens in each process etc.., more or less I request you to follow this learning Journey(try the first one if it is accessible). Hope it helps.

license ? - https://learning.sap.com/courses/sap-master-data-governance
External - https://help.sap.com/learning-journeys/500364457a2610149194f4d6d354c9a6

entry.title: Re: Partial Clearing for Vendors
entry.content:
S/4HANA Public Cloud usually uses document splitting and clearing variants, so residuals are technically new open items.

  • When using App ID F1367 - Clear Outgoing Payments did you use  "Residual Item" as clearing method to trigger creation of residual items as new open items?

entry.title: Re: Why I cannot find the project template when I create...
entry.content:
Dear Ken_Melching,

I tried to configure for Item Template to PS Project ID. But it's very strange that the system couldn't selected any Project ID from F4. I just entered into some digitals, it was passed. But I thought it was not right. Could you please introduce me the right way to configure this item?

Regrads

Vincent

entry.title: Re: Wrong behaviour of cl_gui_alv_grid or wrong usage?
entry.content:
@zeno_rummlerthanks for your comment!

1: I restrict the search help to valid options. If the changes this restriction it is possible to select a wrong value. You have the same behaviour in SAP standard applications for example when seleting a material number. If you need to have a material created in a specific plant, then you can select a material that is NOT created in the plant needed. -> you selected a wrong value.

2: Thanks for this hint! It works if I call the display_protocol method manually. Although I do not see why in this case I should be responsible for displaying the protocol...

entry.title: How to Reterive back standard DPC_Ext class after deleting accidently.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Using the report: SEO_DETECT_GARBAGE I accidently delete the Class:  CL_MM_PRC_SEV_CONFIG_DPC_EXT. How to retrieve Back the dpc_ext class. This is related to Supplier Evaluation Weighting and Scoring (app id: F2551)

Project Name: MM_PRC_SEV_CONFIG

please Help me on this.

thanks

entry.title: CI odata adapter: Edm.Guid 'Wrong literal format for literal'
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I'm building an iFlow using oData adapters (v2) in integration suite. When trying to update (PUT) the record adapter returns error:

com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: Wrong literal format for literal: 'f5cc9649-59ab-1[...]'

I tried to workaround this problem by:

  • using batch (same error);
  • changing local edmx file and GUID type field from Edm.Guid to Edm.String and using guid'f5cc9649-59ab-1[...]' (remote validation fails with Cannot convert guid'f5cc9649-...' to java.util.UUID
  • Playing with Resource Path in adapter's config - changing it to ${property.path} and setting hardcoded value: entityName(GuID=guid'f292992-aaaa-...') but same metadata validation

GUID is defined as:

<Key>
<PropertyRef Name="GuID"/>
</Key>
<Property Name="GuID" Type="Edm.Guid" Nullable="false" sap:display-format="UpperCase" sap:label="UUID" sap:quickinfo="16-byte UID in 32 chars (hexadecimal)" sap:updatable="false"/>

And using it manually (postman) is possible and works. I found that CI produces incorrect requests (in batch), skiping 'guid' part in key definition. Example batch requests, looks like this:

PUT entityName(GuID='f5cc9649-59ab-1[...]') HTTP/1.1

 instead of (which would work):

PUT entityName(GuID=guid'f5cc9649-59ab-1[...]') HTTP/1.1

So either key validation fails in adapter or (with batch) in backend. How to make it work? I tried sap.support and adapter's configuration but there's nothing about such problems. 

Here's my payload I'm testing with:

<entitySetName>
<entityName>
<GuID>f5cc9649-59ab-1[...]</GuID>
<ProcessedAt>1990-01-26T06:40:03.02</ProcessedAt>
</entityName>
</entitySetName>

And adapter's config:

entry.title: Re: SAP Development context : Github Copilot Vs Joule
entry.content: Yes, Joule generates more accurate code plus offers integration with the ABAP repository. Any day it is miles ahead and my choice over any other 3rd party tool.

entry.title: Re: SAP TechEd 2025: Registration is live – check out our brand new hybrid experience!
entry.content:

I look forward to your guidance.

Regards

Maheswari

entry.title: Re: Couldn't create an instance of service 'ABAP environment' with plan 'shared'.
entry.content: @RaulManu can you please try again? I have purged your user from the system.

entry.title: Re: CDS Table Entities - for On-Prem & Private Cloud
entry.content: Hi Austin, CDS table entities are currently not supported with RAP. I'm sorry I can't really tell you more than what is currently announced. It's probably worth watching out for more news for upcoming releases.

entry.title: Calculation View Features of 2025 QRC2
entry.content:
Within the time frame of 2025 Q2, several new calculation view features have been released in SAP Business Application Studio when connected to SAP HANA Cloud database QRC2. Some of these features are highlighted below. You can find examples that illustrate the individual features here. An overview of features of other releases can be found here.

Extract view nodes into Separate Calculation Views

With the refactor option "Extract to New View" you can now easily move a node with its substructures into a new calculation view

and subsequently replace the node with the new calculation view:

This option is available in the context menu of nodes other than the Default and Semantics node:

Modularize the design of your views with this option to increase reuse and insights into the view logic.

Support of HALF_VECTOR

The vector type HALF_VECTOR is now available for calculated columns. It uses 16 bits (16-bit Floating Point) to represent numeric values.
 

 

In addition, the SQL function TO_HALF_VECTOR is now available for conversion
 
 

 

Use this vector type to reduce memory footprint if the reduced precision compared to Real Vector (32-bit floating-point) can be tolerated.
 

Automap Columns By Name Inside Table Function Nodes

When mapping columns in table function nodes a new button is available that maps columns based on their names.
 

  

 Columns of the table input parameter of the table function that have the same names as the input columns, and scalar input parameters with the same names as calculation view input parameters will be automatically mapped when pressing the button.
 
Simplify the definition of table function nodes with this automap option.
 

Copy Window Functions and Local Hierarchies between Calculation Views

Copy window functions and local hierarchies between calculation views
 
 
 

If dependencies, such as used columns are missing in the target node a warning is shown and the dependency removed. If the dependency is mandatory the element has to be manually adapted.

 

More easily reuse your modelling developments across calculation views with this feature.
 

Labels and Notes Support Line Breaks

Labels and notes support now line breaks:

 

Use line breaks to better structure your information

entry.title: Re: BAS : "code: not found"
entry.content: export GIT_EDITOR=vim worked for me, althoug I am using nano. So I used export GIT_EDITOR=nano. After that, the command git rebase -i HEAD~n worked and opened nano.

entry.title: Recommended RAR Structures in interface component configuration
entry.content:
Dear community

Use Case: Request for Support on Recommended Standard Structures for RAR Configuration of Interface Components

Objective:
To request guidance or best practice recommendations on standard structures for configuring SAP RAR (Revenue Accounting and Reporting) interface components, specifically in scenarios involving provider contracts with time-based fulfillment obligations that require revenue deferral based on the contract billing date.

Background:
In the current project, we are working with provider contracts where services are fulfilled over a time period—such as maintenance agreements or subscription-based offerings. These contracts trigger billing at a certain point in time (contract start or milestone), but the revenue must be deferred and recognized over the duration of the service.

A key challenge lies in ensuring that the source system (e.g., SD or a custom billing engine) delivers all required data elements in the correct structure, so that SAP RAR can correctly:

  • Identify the performance obligation as time-based

  • Determine the start and end date for revenue recognition

  • Map billing triggers correctly to the fulfillment schedule

  • Avoid inconsistencies in item class derivation or missing technical keys

Request:
We are seeking recommended standard interface structures, including:

  • Minimum required fields from source (e.g., POB ID, fulfillment type, contract dates, revenue start/end dates, billing date)

  • Structure and mapping logic examples for time-based POBs

  • Any available SAP Notes, Best Practices, or Implementation Guidelines dealing with time-based revenue deferrals for provider contracts

This request is especially relevant as the absence of clear guidance here is currently blocking successful mapping and downstream posting in RAR.

Many thanks in advance

Marvin Brown

entry.title: Re: FAIL: process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running
entry.content: have you checked the trace log of service daemon

entry.title: Re: Partial Clearing for Vendors
entry.content: Okay, great. Thanks the field was hidden for maintaining the residual amount.

entry.title: Re: Wrong behaviour of cl_gui_alv_grid or wrong usage?
entry.content: thanks for your comment @Sandra_Rossi ! It's often hard to know if it's an error in the application or wrong usage. Displaying the protocol manually works in this case.

entry.title: Re: SAP Development context : Github Copilot Vs Joule
entry.content: Hi Prasen, Di you manage to integrate Joule into Eclipse ? to aid with Code completion / suggestion - or do you use Joule as a stand alone ?

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Enabling DTO for ADSOs with Non-...
entry.content:
Hi Shyamala

You can use any key field (for a cube like ADSO all characteristic type fields can be used) to partition an ADSO. It must not be a time characteristic. For further details on enabling DTO on ADSO-s , check the document:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BW4HANA/107a6e8a38b74ede94c833ca3b7b6f51/9d76dae79ab047099ee81b50208d5945.html?locale=en-US

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: Issues with page variable not being able to store val...
entry.content: @AbdulLatif, could you export your app and send it to my email: timo.kapanen@sap.com? We could further investigate this issue, especially if you could also mention which page/component to look at to find the problematic logic. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Sudden wrong results in app behaviour for previous well working formulas in settings and compone
entry.content: Could you export your app and send it to my email: timo.kapanen@sap.com? We could further investigate this issue, especially if you could also mention which page/component to look at to find the problematic logic. Thanks

entry.title: Re: System copy using SWPM Refresh or Move Database Instance(Online DB backup)
entry.content:
1. Make sure HANA Server is listening on port 30015

2. run telnet 10.10.10.108 30015 on server that running SWPM to check the network connectity

entry.title: Re: Setup SAML in SAP HANA with external Identity Provider
entry.content:
Hi ThanhHieuNguyen,

Did you add the Certificate of the IdP to your xsengine Truststore?

You can also add it directly to the certificates list of sapsrv.pse on the server. it's the same.

Regards
Stefan

entry.title: Versions in SAP Service Asset Manager
entry.content:
Hello experts

I cant figure out versioning problem with SSAM. We are now on version 2405

I do the metadata changes in VS code, then build new apk through MDK client build locally on my PC. It is fine. After testing I do deploy through BAS to Mobile Services. But the version in Mobile services always is not the same as in apk. I have always a popup message asking to update. 

In Mobile Services I see the version number that I could manage in Application.app. Also I see revision update (as I understand it is number of times that I deployed version to Mobile Services)

I tried to increase version in format 1.1 or 1.2 or 1.2.1 but still have the same issue of mismatch version in apk and in Mobile services.

could someone explain how to manage versions correctly that Mobile services and apk will show the same version of metadata

 

thank you

Stan

Is it at the manager step or after form completion?

Sachin

entry.title: Re: SAP Project Implementation Template
entry.content:
Hello,

You're looking for a SAP Ariba Procurement Project Implementation Template! This is a common and critical need for organizations undertaking such a significant transformation. While there isn't a single, universally "official" SAP Ariba template available for direct download on the public internet.    catsounds.me

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Employee Central - Approval workflow on Address chang...
entry.content:
Hello, 

there is a possibility to greyed out 'insert new record' button from History icon. 

Remove History and Edit/insert access from Address info Action (1st line in RBP portlet) and keep field level permission to Edit. 

KBA: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2324626

Thank you.

Regards, Arvind Jha

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Hana Cloud Table access over synonym not working
entry.content:
Hi,

the error message suggests that the name of your synonym is wrong. Since you changed the SQL mapping mode you also have to adjust the synonym definition to match the expected mapped name:

{
  "reverse.logix.Addresses": {
    "target": {
        "schema": "SBX",        
        "object": "2VS_YY1_SHIPPT_ADDR"
    }
  }
}

Best regards,

Jonathan

entry.title: Re: PM Form Rating
entry.content:
Hello,

You need to add the Objective V/s Competency section to enable the section rating instead of the item-level rating.

Regards,

Sachin

entry.title: Re: Actual Activity Rate Calculation without using Materi...
entry.content:
Hi Karan,

I just checked again and you are right, KSII only becomes available with scope item 33Q. The revaluation between cost centers that happens with KSII does not post to PRD accounts and uses the original cost element of the activity allocation. There is no way to see them on a PRD account.

Best regards
Marvin

entry.title: Re: execute GRANT_ACTIVATED_ANALYTICAL_PRIVILEGE -> insuf...
entry.content: HAve you find a solution?

entry.title: Request to Enable RequisitionImportPull Web Service in Ariba
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We are planning to integrate with SAP Ariba to create requisitions via the RequisitionImportPull SOAP service. However, the Web Services option under Integration Manager is not visible in our realm.

Kindly help us with:

1. Enabling the RequisitionImportPull web service
2. Granting access to Web Services Configuration
3. Confirming if this must be done in the parent realm

entry.title: AWS system-reboot
entry.content: We currently have a SAP B1 9.3 MSSQL runnings in AWS. AWS has a scheduled "system-reboot" that will happen in 2 days, the AI in AWS says that our host will change as a consequence of said "system-reboot" how will that affect the license currently set in our SAP B1 9.3? If ever the "system-reboot" changes our hardware key can we still use it? even temporarily while awaiting for our partner to issue us a new license based on the new hardware key?

entry.title: Embed custom BTP workzone UI5 app in S/4HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I was wondering whether it was possible to embed a BTP workzone app in S/4HANA Public Cloud? We have customers who are on S/4HANA Public Cloud but have no reason aside from one app to make use of BTP workzone. Is it possible to embed a BTP workzone app to Public Cloud so that users don't need to navigate OR be redirected to workzone for the use of that one app?

I'm aware of the fact that you can create custom tiles which point to apps on BTP workzone, but these will redirect the user to the BTP workzone which in the case of our customers is bothersome for one single app.

 

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: Re: How to map custom attributes and groups from IdP(OIDC...
entry.content: Thank you so much! Your suggestion to look at foreign-scope-references was the final piece of the puzzle that solved my issue. You were exactly right.

entry.title: Re: Data Transfer Workbench (DTW) dependencies on MS Acce...
entry.content:
Hi @softestplease ,

You need to have a valid S-User ID in order to access the SAP Notes. Or contact your SAP Business One partner for the same.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: ABAP Data Integration for SAP Business Data Cloud: configuration, performance, sizing

entry.title: how to fix the error related to Global official numbering: Input parameter incomplete
entry.content:
Hello Team,

During the post goods issue for cost centre via Manage Stock App, we encountered the error: Global official numbering: Input parameter incomplete. We have reviewed the global numbering and unable to ascertain the exact ways to fix at this point.

Any guidance to follow will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to move a multilevel HU from IM storage location...
entry.content: Resolved by using HID delivery and FM GN_DELIVERY_CREATE, automatic GR by PPF following the recommendation of sap note https://me.sap.com/notes/1387128/E.

entry.title: Re: Non PO Invoice Item Not Picked S/4HANA from SAP Busin...
entry.content: No, I believe this is not supported. We ended up developing a custom program by our local ABAP team for this purpose.

entry.title: Re: how to fix the error related to Global official numbe...
entry.content: Read first a KBA such as: 3556877 - ODN issue starting new Fiscal year- S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - GST IN

entry.title: Re: Wrong behaviour of cl_gui_alv_grid or wrong usage?
entry.content:
Thanks to @Sandra_Rossi @zeno_rummler @Ryan-Crosby for figuring out the solution!

The solution is to add this at the end of DATA_CHANGED:

IF E_ONF4 = 'A'.
  er_Data_changed->display_protocol( ).
ENDIF.

For me it's not obvious to do this. I still do not understand why in this case I am responsible for displaying the protocol, but it works. so... ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

entry.title: Re: Issues with page variable not being able to store val...
entry.content: Hi, I have sent you the exported app and related details via email. thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to restore task standard TS00008267 SAP Workflow
entry.content: very simple, change it to original and then save it after that delete the TA
